abilities.name: Chasing Fate
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce an amount of damage equal to the turn number.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Lone Rider
abilities.text: This model may not be targeted by the actions of friendly models.

abilities.name: Nemesis (O)
abilities.text: The O abilities of enemy models within 3" are blank.

actions.name: In Death's Sights
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)12".

triggers.name: Final Breath
triggers.text: Once per activation. Deal an additional amount of damage to the target equal to the turn number -1. This model heals the same amount.

actions.name: Revel in Conflict
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. All friendly models within range heal 1, or 2 if they are engaged.

triggers.name: Hatred Unleashed
triggers.text: Once per game. All friendly models healed this way declare an attack action (maximum 3).

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz. Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Diminished Pain
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target heals 4.
